title: Spotify
description: Spotify is a digital music, podcast, and video streaming service that gives you access to millions of songs and other content from creators all over the world. Enjoy music, curated playlists, and podcasts ad-free with Spotify Premium.

title: Instagram
description: Instagram is a photo and video sharing social networking service. Connect with friends, explore trending content, share stories and reels, and discover creators from around the world in one place.

title: WhatsApp
description: WhatsApp is a freeware, cross-platform, centralized instant messaging and voice-over-IP service. It allows users to send text and voice messages, make voice and video calls, and share images, documents, locations, and other content.

title: YouTube
description: YouTube is a video-sharing platform where users can upload, view, rate, share, add to playlists, report, comment on videos, and subscribe to other users. It offers a wide range of content including music videos, documentaries, live streams, and more.

title: Netflix
description: Netflix is a streaming service that offers a wide variety of award-winning TV shows, movies, anime, documentaries, and more on thousands of internet-connected devices. Watch as much as you want, whenever you want.

title: TikTok
description: TikTok is a short-form video hosting service owned by ByteDance. It hosts user-submitted videos, which can range in duration from three seconds to ten minutes. Discover trending content, create videos, and connect with a global community.

title: Duolingo
description: Duolingo is the world's most popular language-learning platform. With gamified lessons, streaks, and over 40 languages available, it makes learning a new language fun, effective, and free for everyone.

title: Telegram
description: Telegram is a cloud-based instant messaging app with a focus on security and speed. It supports text messages, voice calls, video calls, file sharing, stickers, and large group communities with up to 200,000 members.

title: Canva
description: Canva is a graphic design platform used to create social media graphics, presentations, posters, documents and other visual content. It's available on web and mobile, and integrates millions of images, fonts, templates and illustrations.

title: Zoom
description: Zoom is a cloud-based video conferencing service you can use to virtually meet with others - either by video or audio-only or both, while conducting live chats. It supports webinars, virtual events, and team collaboration.

title: Notion
description: Notion is an all-in-one workspace for notes, tasks, wikis, and databases. It is designed to help individuals and teams manage projects, documents, and collaboration with a highly customizable and modular interface.

title: Google Maps
description: Google Maps is a web mapping service that offers satellite imagery, aerial photography, street maps, 360° interactive panoramic views of streets, real-time traffic conditions, and route planning for traveling by foot, car, bicycle and air.

title: Shazam
description: Shazam is a music recognition app that identifies songs based on a short sample played using a device's microphone. It can identify music, movies, advertising, and television shows based on a short sample of audio.

title: Headspace
description: Headspace is a digital health platform providing guided meditation, mindfulness, and sleep content. It helps users reduce stress, improve focus, sleep better, and build healthier habits through daily mindfulness exercises.

title: Uber
description: Uber is a ride-hailing app that connects drivers and riders. Book a ride in minutes, track your driver in real time, pay seamlessly, and rate your experience. Uber also offers food delivery, freight services, and electric bike rentals.

title: Airbnb
description: Airbnb is an online marketplace for short-term homestays and experiences. Book unique accommodations — from private rooms to entire homes — or share your space and earn extra income as a host anywhere in the world.

title: Robinhood
description: Robinhood is a commission-free investing app that lets users buy and sell stocks, ETFs, options, and cryptocurrencies. With a simple interface and real-time data, it democratizes finance for a new generation of investors.

title: Todoist
description: Todoist is a task management app that helps you organize and prioritize your tasks. With features like recurring deadlines, project collaboration, productivity tracking, and integrations with 60+ apps, it keeps your work and life on track.

title: Google Pay
description: Google Pay is a digital wallet platform and online payment system developed by Google to power in-app and tap-to-pay purchases on mobile devices. It supports money transfers, bill splitting, and merchant offers.

title: Calm
description: Calm is a mindfulness app focused on meditation, sleep, and relaxation. Featuring sleep stories narrated by celebrities, guided meditation sessions, breathing exercises, and soothing music, Calm helps reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality.

title: Discord
description: Discord is a VoIP and instant messaging social platform. Users have the ability to communicate with voice calls, video calls, text messaging, media and files in private chats or as part of communities called servers.

title: Shopify
description: Shopify is a commerce platform that allows anyone to set up an online store and sell their products. Manage inventory, process payments, fulfill orders, track analytics, and grow your business from one intuitive dashboard.

title: Adobe Lightroom
description: Adobe Lightroom is a powerful photo editing and organization app. Edit RAW files with professional-grade tools, apply presets, batch edit, and sync your photos across devices with seamless Adobe Creative Cloud integration.
